name: Chocolate Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Sift cocoa powder with 1 cup granulated sugar twice.
3. Sift cake flour with the remaining granulated sugar three times.
4. Beat egg whites until foamy.
5. Add salt and cream of tartar, then beat until the mixture forms stiff peaks.
6. Gradually fold the beaten egg whites into the cocoa powder mixture.
7. Gently incorporate the flour mixture into the cocoa mixture.
8. Blend in vanilla extract and almond extract.
9. Pour batter into an ungreased tube pan.
10. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until set.
11. Invert the cake onto a plate to cool completely.
12. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and fresh strawberries before serving.
Note: If your tube pan lacks "legs," invert it onto a bottle with a long neck to prevent the sides from slipping down and shrinking the cake. This recipe is low in fat and cholesterol.
